title: Marx and Engels Face West - Quick Summary
items: **The monument opened in April 1986** as a late GDR statement in the centre of East Berlin.
**The west-facing story comes from movement, not a clean original plan:** U5 construction shifted and rotated the figures in 2010.
**The joke stuck because it is perfect Berlin:** Marx and Engels were said to be looking at capitalism at last.
**The statues survived reunification** because Berlin kept them as visible evidence, not as instruction.
**In 2026, expect construction disruption** around the Rathaus- and Marx-Engels-Forum redesign, with access and sightlines changing.
